title: The Deviation Management Lifecycle
alt: Five-stage deviation management process from capture to trending

items.label: Capture & classify
items.desc: Grade minor, major or critical using ICH Q9 risk principles

items.label: Contain immediately
items.desc: Protect product, equipment and people before investigating

items.label: Find the root cause
items.desc: Five whys or fishbone; human error is a symptom, not a cause

items.label: Assess product impact
items.desc: Document a scientific conclusion on every batch affected

items.label: CAPA & close
items.desc: Implement actions with an owner and an effectiveness check

items.label: Trend the data
items.desc: Feed PQR and management review to drive improvement
